Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:%21function()%7Bfunction%20t(t)%7Bdocument.body.removeChild(t)%7Dfunction%20e(t%2Co%2Cr%3D2)%7Bo.style.color%3D%22gray%22%2Cfetch(t%2C%7Bmethod%3A%22HEAD%22%2Credirect%3A%22manual%22%7D).then(e%3D%3E%7Be.ok%3F(c.push(%60%24%7Bt%7D%20is%20OK%20(%24%7Be.status%7D)%60)%2Co.style.color%3D%22green%22)%3A404%3D%3D%3De.status%3F(c.push(%60%24%7Bt%7D%20is%20broken%20(404)%60)%2Co.style.color%3D%22red%22)%3Ae.status%3E%3D300%26%26e.status%3C400%3F(c.push(%60%24%7Bt%7D%20is%20a%20redirect%20(%24%7Be.status%7D)%60)%2Co.style.color%3D%22orange%22)%3A(c.push(%60%24%7Bt%7D%20returned%20status%20%24%7Be.status%7D%60)%2Co.style.color%3D%22orange%22)%2Cs%2B%2B%2Cn()%7D).catch(()%3D%3E%7Br%3E0%3FsetTimeout(()%3D%3Ee(t%2Co%2Cr-1)%2C1e3)%3A(c.push(%60%24%7Bt%7D%20could%20not%20be%20reached%20after%20multiple%20attempts%60)%2Co.style.color%3D%22red%22%2Cs%2B%2B%2Cn())%7D)%7Dfunction%20n()%7Bconst%20e%3Ds%2Fr.length*100%3Ba.update(e)%2Cs%3D%3D%3Dr.length%26%26setTimeout(()%3D%3E%7Ba.remove()%2Cfunction(e)%7Bconst%20n%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bn.className%3D%22link-checker-overlay%22%2Cn.onclick%3De%3D%3E%7Be.target%3D%3D%3Dn%26%26t(n)%7D%3Bconst%20o%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bo.className%3D%22link-checker-modal%22%3Bconst%20r%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Br.className%3D%22link-checker-close%22%2Cr.innerHTML%3D%22%5Cxd7%22%2Cr.onclick%3D()%3D%3Et(n)%3Bconst%20c%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bc.className%3D%22link-checker-content%22%3Bconst%20s%3Ddocument.createElement(%22pre%22)%3Bs.textContent%3De%2Cc.appendChild(s)%2Co.appendChild(r)%2Co.appendChild(c)%2Cn.appendChild(o)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(n)%7D(c.join(%22%5Cn%22))%7D%2C100)%7Dconst%20o%3Ddocument.createElement(%22style%22)%3Bo.textContent%3D%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.link-checker-modal%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctposition%3A%20fixed%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttop%3A%2050%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctleft%3A%2050%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttransform%3A%20translate(-50%25%2C%20-50%25)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbackground%3A%20white%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctpadding%3A%2020px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctborder-radius%3A%205px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbox-shadow%3A%200%202px%2010px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.1)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctmax-width%3A%2080%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctmax-height%3A%2080vh%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctz-index%3A%2010000%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.link-checker-content%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctmax-height%3A%20calc(80vh%20-%2040px)%3B%20%2F*%20Account%20for%20padding%20*%2F%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctoverflow-y%3A%20auto%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.link-checker-overlay%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctposition%3A%20fixed%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttop%3A%200%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctleft%3A%200%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctright%3A%200%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbottom%3A%200%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbackground%3A%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.5)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctz-index%3A%209999%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctcursor%3A%20pointer%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.link-checker-close%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctposition%3A%20absolute%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttop%3A%2010px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctright%3A%2010px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctcursor%3A%20pointer%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctfont-size%3A%2020px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctcolor%3A%20%23666%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.link-checker-close%3Ahover%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctcolor%3A%20%23000%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.progress-container%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctposition%3A%20fixed%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttop%3A%2020px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctright%3A%2020px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbackground%3A%20white%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctpadding%3A%2015px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctborder-radius%3A%205px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbox-shadow%3A%200%202px%2010px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.1)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctz-index%3A%2010000%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctmin-width%3A%20200px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.progress-bar%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctwidth%3A%20100%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctheight%3A%2020px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbackground-color%3A%20%23f0f0f0%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctborder-radius%3A%2010px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctoverflow%3A%20hidden%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.progress-fill%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctheight%3A%20100%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctbackground-color%3A%20%234CAF50%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctwidth%3A%200%25%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttransition%3A%20width%200.3s%20ease%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct.progress-text%20%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Cttext-align%3A%20center%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctmargin-top%3A%205px%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ctfont-family%3A%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%22%2Cdocument.head.appendChild(o)%3Bconst%20r%3DArray.from(document.querySelectorAll(%22a%22)).filter(t%3D%3E%21t.href.startsWith(%22mailto%3A%22)%26%26%21t.href.startsWith(%22javascript%3A%22))%2Cc%3D%5B%5D%3Blet%20s%3D0%3Bif(0%3D%3D%3Dr.length)return%20void%20alert(%22No%20valid%20links%20found%20on%20this%20page.%22)%3Bconst%20a%3Dfunction()%7Bconst%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bt.className%3D%22progress-container%22%3Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Be.className%3D%22progress-bar%22%3Bconst%20n%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bn.className%3D%22progress-fill%22%3Bconst%20o%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Breturn%20o.className%3D%22progress-text%22%2Co.textContent%3D%22Checking%20links%3A%200%25%22%2Ce.appendChild(n)%2Ct.appendChild(e)%2Ct.appendChild(o)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(t)%2C%7Bupdate%3At%3D%3E%7Bn.style.width%3D%60%24%7Bt%7D%25%60%2Co.textContent%3D%60Checking%20links%3A%20%24%7BMath.round(t)%7D%25%60%7D%2Cremove%3A()%3D%3E%7Bdocument.body.removeChild(t)%7D%7D%7D()%3Br.forEach((t%2Cn)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20o%3Dt.href%3BsetTimeout(()%3D%3Ee(o%2Ct)%2C500*n)%7D)%7D()%2Cconsole.log(%22%5CnSource%3A%20homemade%5CnBookmarklet%20name%3A%20Check%20Links%5Cn%22)%3B
